originContent: AutoPlug-Client is a standalone, executable Java program that has multiple execution modes: Server-Wrapper, CLI-Tool, Background-Service. Its main purpose is to automate updating of any sofware related to servers and simplify server maintenance in general. While all server types are compatible (including Steam game servers), the majority of its features cater specifically to Minecraft, which is renowned as the world's top-selling game and boasts an exceptionally extensive modding community.
translatedContent: AutoPlug-Client is a standalone, executable Java program that has multiple execution modes: Server-Wrapper, CLI-Tool, Background-Service. Its main purpose is to automate updating of any software related to servers and simplify server maintenance in general. While all server types are compatible (including Steam game servers), the majority of its features cater specifically to Minecraft, which is renowned as the world's top-selling game and boasts an exceptionally extensive modding community.

originContent: - Automated self, server-software, plugins, mods and JRE (Java Runtime Enviornment) updating

originContent: - Web-Panel for starting, stopping restarting the server and viewing the last updating results summaries
translatedContent: - Web-Panel for starting, stopping restarting the server and viewing the last updating results summaries

originContent: Stable and feature-complete, thus community driven development, meaning the lead developer will not develop new features and rely on pull requests by others, except for security issues and critical bugs.
translatedContent: Stable and feature-complete, thus community driven development, meaning the lead developer will not develop new features and rely on pull requests by others, except for security issues and critical bugs.

Thank you for considering to contribute, the community 💙 that! Just keep these things in mind:

originContent: Thank you for considering to contribute, the community 💙 that! Just keep these things in mind:
translatedContent: - Create an issue first if you want to do big changes, so we can discuss it.

originContent: - Create an issue first if you want to do big changes, so we can discuss it.
translatedContent: - Remember that big changes also require you to write tests.

originContent: - Remember that big changes also require you to write tests.
translatedContent: - You can pick and work on any open issue. Let us know that you are working on it.

originContent: - You can pick and work on any open issue. Let us know that you are working on it.
translatedContent: - Avoid using and writing static methods/fields/classes to ensure minimal memory usage.

originContent: - Avoid using and writing static methods/fields/classes to ensure minimal memory usage.

originContent: creating a pull request for fixing/closing that issue will receive the bounty (15€). Note that your code must have

originContent: at least one test demonstrating that the implemented fix/feature is working. Also note that payments are only made via PayPal, so make sure
